remarks: Thoughtfully reimagined in an architect-designed renovation, this exceptional Orchard Hills townhouse blends timeless craftsmanship with custom millwork throughout. Offering three bedrooms, 3.5 baths, the residence welcomes you with a beautifully designed foyer featuring two concealed coat closets and a powder room before opening through an elegant arched doorway into the expansive open-concept living spaces. The beautiful kitchen flows seamlessly into the dining area and living room with fireplace, custom built-ins and integrated firewood storage, creating an ideal setting for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. Private patio provides a tranquil outdoor retreat. Positioned apart from the two additional ensuite bedrooms, the luxurious primary suite is a true sanctuary featuring exceptional custom built-in dresser drawers, extensive storage, and a spa-inspired marble bath with heated floors and a steam shower. All bedrooms feature oversized closets, providing exceptional storage rarely found in condominium living. The fully finished lower level offers a spacious family room with flexible space for a home office, gym or media room. Residents enjoy Orchard Hills' heated pool and an exceptional location just moments from Mead Park, tennis, pickleball, the commuter train, farmers market and downtown New Canaan's acclaimed restaurants, chic boutiques, schools and library.
